title: gleditsia horrida
intro: Gleditsia horrida, also known as the thorny locust, is a deciduous tree native to China, characterized by its distinctive thorns and compound leaves. The bark and leaves of Gleditsia horrida have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The tree is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Gleditsia horrida can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese herbal remedies for various ailments.
